{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kharrus
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kharrus]] is the [[Herald]] of the [[Nine-Hands]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kharrus]] is quiet, even-tempered, and reliable.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
